summary: W840 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and routes the W839 target homology-zero left-calculus data through the existing walking-parallel-pair finite-shape transfer construction. Dbounded.remainingStableFieldsOfClosedMapTargetHomologyZeroFiniteShapeW840 and the closed-embedding analogue derive the finite-limit and finite-colimit parts from MetrizableWalkingParallelPairTransferStableSemanticInputs. Dbounded.boundedDerivedInfinityCategoryOfClosedMapTargetHomologyZeroFiniteShapeW840 and its closed-embedding analogue assemble bounded-derived infinity-category packages from W839 data plus WPP transfer-stable fields. The route still lacks concrete W735 branch data, W790 target homology-zero realization data, WPP finite-shape transfer input, pretriangulated structure, triangulated structure, and the original four-task completion witness.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W840 derives finite limits and finite colimits from WPP finite-shape transfer inputs, but concrete W735 branch values and W790 target homology-zero realization data still must be constructed.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA WPP finite-shape transfer input, pretriangulated structure, and triangulated structure remain missing.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still lack an original four-task completion witness.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit in the completion packet shape required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch data for MetrizableLCA, including its W721 localized-right-adjoint payload.
Construct W790 target homology-zero realization data indexed by W831-derived MetrizableLCA cochain homology.

Construct MetrizableWalkingParallelPairFiniteShapeTransferInputs for Dbounded MetrizableLCA so W840 can derive finite limits and finite colimits without primitive finite-limit or finite-colimit inputs.
Construct pretriangulated and triangulated structures for Dbounded MetrizableLCA compatible with the W839 selected left-calculus fields.
Expose a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after those structures are real, then refresh the review packet fixtures and clean extraction audit.
